Jekyll部署问题处理

Q: jekyll 2.2.0 | Error: incompatible character encodings: UTF-8 and GBK

A: 设置编码

    export LANG="en_US.UTF-8"
    export LC_ALL="en_US.UTF-8"

  1. Q: jekyll 2.2.0 | Error: Included file '_includes/JB/setup' not found
